findings.title: AGENTS handoff omits new macOS preferences implementation surface
findings.suggested_fix: Add `lib/macos_preferences.sh` to the High-Value Files table and add a Task Map row for changing macOS preference backup/restore behavior, pointing to `lib/macos_preferences.sh`, `lib/wizard.sh`, `lib/generate.sh`, and `templates/install.sh` as appropriate.

residual_risks: Review was limited to project standards in AGENTS.md; macOS defaults semantics, privacy coverage, and restore correctness were not reviewed here.
testing_gaps: AGENTS.md requires `./tests/verify_fixes.sh` after changes in `lib/` or `templates/` and `./tests/generate_regressions.sh` after generation/template changes; no test run evidence was present in the scoped artifact, and this read-only persona did not execute tests.
